$comment: Claude Code hooks for plugin/marketplace validation. Add to .claude/settings.json

hooks.command: bash -c 'FORBIDDEN="skills|agents|workflows|commands|hooks|stack|memory|generated"; if grep -qE "\"($FORBIDDEN)\":" "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; then echo "ERROR: plugin.json contains forbidden fields"; exit 1; fi; if jq -e ".author | type == \"string\"" "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo "ERROR: author must be object, not string"; exit 1; fi; echo "✓ plugin.json validated"'
bash -c 'if ! jq -e ".name and .plugins" "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "ERROR: marketplace.json missing name or plugins"; exit 1; fi; echo "✓ marketplace.json validated"'
